diff --git a/all-games.qmd b/all-games.qmd
index d884fcc02f8cb323391344b4ed2ed6acd2a20d0b..8cd7d324be6f633b45b00db53fac5a17fad7dd19 100644
--- a/all-games.qmd
+++ b/all-games.qmd
@@ -1,39 +1,39 @@
 ---
 title: "All Games"
 page-layout: full
 toc: false
 ---
 
 ```{=html}
 <div class="mongolia-shell hub-shell">
   <section class="hub-hero">
     <p class="archive-eyebrow">Game Library</p>
     <h1>All Games</h1>
     <p class="hub-lead">
-      A growing set of Mongolia-focused games and quick geography challenges. Start with the four
-      live games below, then use the reserved slots as the library expands.
+      A growing set of Mongolia-focused games and quick geography challenges. Start with the eight
+      live games below spanning maps, culture, history, and fast quiz decks.
     </p>
   </section>
 
   <section class="hub-grid">
     <a class="game-tile game-tile-live" href="mongolia-100.html">
       <p class="game-tile-label">Live now</p>
       <h2>Mongolia 100</h2>
       <p class="game-tile-copy">
         Build a streak by answering Mongolia fact cards without repeats inside a cycle.
       </p>
       <div class="game-tile-meta">
         <span>100 facts</span>
         <span>Streak mode</span>
         <span>Daily play</span>
       </div>
     </a>
 
     <a class="game-tile game-tile-live game-tile-accent" href="province-guessr.html">
       <p class="game-tile-label">Live now</p>
       <h2>Province Guessr</h2>
       <p class="game-tile-copy">
         Click the correct aimag on an interactive Mongolia map and keep the province streak alive.
       </p>
       <div class="game-tile-meta">
         <span>21 aimags</span>
@@ -46,35 +46,56 @@ toc: false
       <p class="game-tile-label">Live now</p>
       <h2>Landmark Guessr</h2>
       <p class="game-tile-copy">
         Read the landmark prompt, place it on the map, and chain together a full location streak.
       </p>
       <div class="game-tile-meta">
         <span>11 landmarks</span>
         <span>Map precision</span>
         <span>No repeats in a run</span>
       </div>
     </a>
 
     <a class="game-tile game-tile-live game-tile-accent" href="ger-puzzle.html">
       <p class="game-tile-label">Live now</p>
       <h2>Ger Builder</h2>
       <p class="game-tile-copy">
         Learn the order of building a Mongolian ger by placing each structural piece and cover in sequence.
       </p>
       <div class="game-tile-meta">
         <span>7 build steps</span>
         <span>Animated lesson</span>
         <span>Educational play</span>
       </div>
     </a>
 
-    <article class="game-tile game-tile-soon">
-      <p class="game-tile-label">Coming soon</p>
-      <h2>History Sprint</h2>
-      <p class="game-tile-copy">
-        Placeholder slot for a future timeline or historical fact guessing game.
-      </p>
-    </article>
+    <a class="game-tile game-tile-live" href="steppe-wildlife.html">
+      <p class="game-tile-label">New</p>
+      <h2>Steppe Wildlife</h2>
+      <p class="game-tile-copy">Fast quiz on Mongolia's iconic wildlife, habitats, and conservation stories.</p>
+      <div class="game-tile-meta"><span>10 cards</span><span>Nature theme</span><span>Streak mode</span></div>
+    </a>
+
+    <a class="game-tile game-tile-live game-tile-accent" href="naadam-arena.html">
+      <p class="game-tile-label">New</p>
+      <h2>Naadam Arena</h2>
+      <p class="game-tile-copy">Challenge yourself with questions about Naadam sports, customs, and festival culture.</p>
+      <div class="game-tile-meta"><span>10 cards</span><span>Festival theme</span><span>Streak mode</span></div>
+    </a>
+
+    <a class="game-tile game-tile-live" href="empire-timeline.html">
+      <p class="game-tile-label">New</p>
+      <h2>Empire Timeline</h2>
+      <p class="game-tile-copy">Run through key Mongolian history milestones, leaders, and turning points.</p>
+      <div class="game-tile-meta"><span>10 cards</span><span>History theme</span><span>Streak mode</span></div>
+    </a>
+
+    <a class="game-tile game-tile-live game-tile-accent" href="ger-life.html">
+      <p class="game-tile-label">New</p>
+      <h2>Ger Life</h2>
+      <p class="game-tile-copy">Learn daily-life and household traditions connected to the Mongolian ger.</p>
+      <div class="game-tile-meta"><span>10 cards</span><span>Culture theme</span><span>Streak mode</span></div>
+    </a>
+
   </section>
 </div>
 ```
